Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $173,956,935Details
International Box Office $586,775,991
Worldwide Box Office $760,732,926
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $22,720,161
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $26,115,519
Total $48,835,680
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Ever since hulking lawman Hobbs, a loyal agent of America’s Diplomatic Security Service, and lawless outcast Shaw, a former British military elite operative, first faced off in 2015’s Furious 7, the duo have swapped smack talk and body blows as they’ve tried to take each other down. But when cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist Brixton gains control of an insidious bio-threat that could alter humanity forever — and bests a brilliant and fearless rogue MI6 agent, who just happens to be Shaw’s sister — these two sworn enemies will have to partner up to bring down the only guy who might be badder than themselves.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$60,038,950 (34.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.90 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:22.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,253 opening theaters/4,344 max. theaters, 6.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $227,131,547

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 2nd, 2019 (Wide) by Universal
August 2nd, 2019 (IMAX) by Universal
International Releases: July 31st, 2019 (Wide) (Philippines)
July 31st, 2019 (Wide) (Egypt)
July 31st, 2019 (Wide) (Trinidad)
July 31st, 2019 (Wide) (Indonesia)
August 1st, 2019 (Wide) (Macedonia)
Video Release: October 15th, 2019 by Universal Home Entertainment
December 2nd, 2019 by Universal Pictures UK
MPA Rating: PG-13 for prolonged sequences of action and violence, suggestive material and some strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2584 (Cert #52255), 6/26/2019)
Running Time: 134 minutes
Franchise: Fast and the Furious
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue, Split Screen
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Geographical setting: London
Plot point: Car Accident, Car Chase, Dysfunctional Family, Enemies Forced to Work Together, Environment, Framed, Fugitive / On the Run, Manhunt, MI6, Rogue Agent, Shootout, Super Soldiers
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Seven Bucks Productions, Chris Morgan Productions, Universal Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Ever since hulking lawman Hobbs, a loyal agent of America’s Diplomatic Security Service, and lawless outcast Shaw, a former British military elite operative, first faced off in 2015’s Furious 7, the duo have swapped smack talk and body blows as they’ve tried to take each other down. But when cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist Brixton gains control of an insidious bio-threat that could alter humanity forever — and bests a brilliant and fearless rogue MI6 agent, who just happens to be Shaw’s sister — these two sworn enemies will have to partner up to bring down the only guy who might be badder than themselves.

Opening Weekend:$60,038,950 (34.5% of total gross)
